hero.title: Equipment built and sourced for institutional reliability.
hero.description:
Proprietary PEIC-manufactured sterilization systems from Mumbai, supported by partner medical technologies from 14+ global and Indian brands to cover your entire hospital's requirements. 
Specified, installed, and supported by one technical team with a single point of contact.

manufacturing.title: PEIC Sterilization Systems
manufacturing.description: Engineered and assembled at PEIC's Shamroz Industrial Estate facility cluster in Goregaon West, with direct OEM accountability from pressure vessel to commissioning.
manufacturing.advantages_subtitle: Sterilization equipment is not treated as a commodity purchase. PEIC keeps engineering, spares, documentation, and service ownership close to the source.

advantages.title: In-House Engineering
advantages.description: Design, production, inspection, and installation handled through PEIC's Mumbai manufacturing base.

advantages.title: BIS-Certified Since 1976
advantages.description: Longest standing BIS 3829 Part 1 and Part 2 certification history across PEIC's primary sterilizer categories.

advantages.title: Localized Spare Parts
advantages.description: Stocked critical spares for PEIC-manufactured systems and localised team of technical experts for rapid-response service to minimise avoidable downtime.

advantages.title: MSME & NSIC Registered
advantages.description: MSME and NSIC registration support where applicable, with eligibility reviewed against each procurement requirement.

partners.title: Global & Domestic Partner Technologies
partners.description: Current associations with 14+ leading medical equipment brands across oncology, OT, imaging, dental, neonatal care, specialty departments and many more.
partners.advantages_subtitle: Specification support, installation, training, service coordination, and documentation through one PEIC relationship.

advantages.title: Technical Integration
advantages.description: Installation, calibration, application training, and validation support where required by the equipment type.

advantages.title: Unified Service Relationship
advantages.description: Coordinated AMC/CMC planning across PEIC-manufactured and supported partner equipment.

advantages.title: Pan-India Coordination
advantages.description: Service dispatch, technical queries, and parts coordination through PEIC engineers and partner engineer networks.

advantages.title: Single-Point Procurement
advantages.description: One PEIC contact manages specifications, quotations, and delivery coordination across represented categories.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: Rectangular CSSD steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 1 coverage, PC-based cycle automation, SS-316 chamber construction, and enquiry-led sizing, tray, trolley, and documentation options.

detail.seo_title: Horizontal Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer | PEIC
detail.seo_description: PEIC horizontal rectangular high-pressure steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 1 coverage, PC-based automation, SS-316 chamber construction, and configurable CSSD accessories.
detail.eyebrow: BIS IS 3829 Part 1 - Rectangular CSSD sterilizer
detail.title: Horizontal rectangular sterilizer for CSSD loads, records, and configurable chamber workflows.
detail.summary: A PEIC-manufactured rectangular high-pressure steam sterilizer for institutions that need repeatable 121 C sterilization cycles, load documentation, automatic/manual operation, and project-specific configuration support.
detail.brief_title: Built for larger CSSD and institutional sterilization rooms
detail.brief: The rectangular format supports larger load handling than compact cylindrical units, while the PC-based control package records temperature, pressure, vacuum, cycle time, operator and batch details. Final sizing, accessories, utilities, documentation, and validation support are confirmed against the buyer's load mix and site conditions.
detail.customization_title: Configuration can be worked on around
customization: Chamber size, loading pattern, tray set, rack set, and transfer trolley requirement
Automation package, process recording, printer, password levels, and cycle documentation
Fast or slow exhaust preferences, drying/vacuum requirements, and filtered-air drying support
Material thickness, SS grade, outer finish, stand, levelling, and site installation constraints
Water quality, feed-water pump, descaling, antiscalant dosing, and maintenance planning
detail.options_title: Typical points PEIC confirms before final specification.
detail.options_intro: The pasted values are treated as indicative public guidance. PEIC confirms final figures, drawings, and compliance documentation after reviewing the purchase requirement.

options.label: Chamber and pressure vessel
options.choices: Rectangular chamber, SS-316 chamber plate, jacket and generator construction as per requirement
options.note: Useful for CSSD teams planning load volume, chamber access, and long-term corrosion resistance.

options.label: Heating and utilities
options.choices: 36 kW electric immersion heating, 400/440 V, 3-phase, 50 Hz supply
options.note: Electrical load and site readiness are checked before quotation and commissioning.

options.label: Controls and records
options.choices: PC-based monitoring, programming, data acquisition, graphing, printer, and manual override
options.note: Supports leak test, Bowie-Dick, HPHV, liquid media, glassware, and instrument cycle workflows.

options.label: Safety and door package
options.choices: Dished SS-304 door, pressure locking, manual lock, silicone gasket, safety valves, gauges, trap and check valve
options.note: Door and pressure safety are configured around operating pressure and chamber layout.

options.label: Accessories
options.choices: SS-316 trays/racks, transfer trolley, stand, levelling flanges, and site-specific handling aids
options.note: Accessory scope is finalized from load size, department movement, and room layout.

detail.spec_note: Indicative values include PHRS#APC#850, 600 x 900 x 1500 mm approx. chamber size, 36 kW heating, 121 C operation, and 15-20 psi operating pressure. Material of construction and thickness may vary by customer requirement.
detail.highlights_title: What buyers should notice in the rectangular model.

highlights.title: PC-based process visibility
highlights.description: Programmable cycles, live temperature and pressure graphing, F0 value display, cycle data recording, and printable reports support audit-friendly operation.

highlights.title: Dual operating approach
highlights.description: Automatic control with manual override gives operators a controlled process path while retaining service and intervention flexibility.

highlights.title: Pressure and drying support
highlights.description: Vacuum pump, ejector, filtered-air vacuum breaker, steam trap, baffle, and exhaust settings support sterilization and drying performance.

highlights.title: Configurable load handling
highlights.description: Racks, half-size trays, trolley, stand, door handling, and room fit can be discussed against CSSD workflow.

applications: Instrument, glassware, and liquid media cycles
Institutions requiring recorded batch and operator data
buyer_questions: What chamber capacity, load dimensions, and daily cycle volume should be planned?
Is printed or digital cycle documentation required for procurement or audit?
What electrical supply, water quality, drainage, and room access are available at site?
Are trays, racks, transfer trolley, or special loading accessories needed with the machine?
detail.cta_description: Share the intended load, chamber preference, department, site utilities, and documentation needs. PEIC will respond with suitable indicative specifications and quotation guidance.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal Cylindrical High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: Cylindrical 556 L-class high-pressure steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 1 coverage, programmable PC-based automation, SS-316L chamber surfaces, and configurable heating load.

detail.seo_title: Horizontal Cylindrical High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer | PEIC
detail.seo_description: PEIC horizontal cylindrical high-pressure steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 1 coverage, 556 L indicative capacity, PC-based automation, and SS-316L chamber construction.
detail.eyebrow: BIS IS 3829 Part 1 - Cylindrical high-pressure sterilizer
detail.title: Horizontal cylindrical sterilizer with programmable cycles and 556 L-class chamber capacity.
detail.summary: A PEIC-manufactured cylindrical horizontal steam sterilizer for hospitals, laboratories, and CSSD support areas that need 121 C pressure-steam sterilization, automated cycle control, and serviceable stainless construction.
detail.brief_title: A horizontal cylindrical format for dependable institutional cycles
detail.brief: The cylindrical high-pressure model combines a 556 L-class chamber, programmable sterilization cycles, vacuum-assisted drying support, feed-water automation, and stainless pressure-vessel construction. It is suited to departments that need repeatable sterilization with a simpler cylindrical loading format.
detail.customization_title: Configuration can be worked on around
customization: Heating load selection between 18, 27, and 36 kW as site utilities allow
Cycle programming, leak test, Bowie-Dick, HPHV, liquid media, glassware, and instrument routines
Tray, stand, drain, vacuum, filtered-air drying, and water-feed arrangements
Documentation package, operator fields, batch naming, printer, and report format
SS grades, finish, thickness, and installation footprint where the procurement permits variation
detail.options_title: Typical points PEIC confirms for the cylindrical model.
detail.options_intro: Final model configuration depends on load type, site utilities, procurement format, and documentation expectations.

options.label: Chamber and capacity
options.choices: D 750 x L 1200 mm, 556 L approx., cylindrical chamber
options.note: Capacity and usable load pattern are checked against trays, containers, and department workflow.

options.label: Operating conditions
options.choices: 121 C approx., 20 psi operating pressure, fast or slow exhaust settings
options.note: Cycle selection depends on load sensitivity, drying expectations, and throughput.

options.label: Automation
options.choices: PC-based control, programmable parameters, cycle data, real-time graphs, and print reports
options.note: Useful where batch records and operator traceability are part of procurement review.

options.label: Construction
options.choices: SS-316L chamber/back plate, SS-304 jacket and steam generator, SS bright-finish piping
options.note: Material specification is confirmed before tender response or quotation.

options.label: Steam generator package
options.choices: Immersion heaters, low-water protection, gauge glass, heater plate, controller, descaling and antiscalant provisions
options.note: Supports safer boiler operation and planned maintenance.

detail.spec_note: Indicative values include PHHP#APC#556, D 750 x L 1200 mm, 556 L approx., 121 C operation, and 20 psi operating pressure. Heating load and material details are confirmed with the buyer.
detail.highlights_title: What buyers should notice in the cylindrical model.

highlights.title: Large cylindrical chamber
highlights.description: The 556 L-class format supports hospital and laboratory loads where a cylindrical loading path is preferred.

highlights.title: Programmable process control
highlights.description: Cycle parameters, pulses, sterilization time, drying vacuum, leak test and routine cycles can be programmed and recorded.

highlights.title: Vacuum and feed-water support
highlights.description: A 3 HP water-ring vacuum pump and automatic feed-water pump support drying and boiler water management.

highlights.title: Serviceable stainless build
highlights.description: SS chamber surfaces, bright-finish piping, accessible fittings, and stand construction support long-term maintenance.

applications: Laboratories handling glassware or liquid media
Departments needing recorded high-pressure steam cycles
buyer_questions: What load sizes and tray/container dimensions must the chamber accept?
Which heating load can the site electrical infrastructure support?
Are cycle graphs, batch records, and operator codes required?
What drying, exhaust, and water-quality conditions should be planned?
detail.cta_description: Share load type, desired capacity, utilities, and documentation requirements. PEIC will confirm the suitable cylindrical configuration and quotation details.

manufactured_products.name: Horizontal High-Speed Steam Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: BIS IS 3829 Part 2 high-speed horizontal sterilizer for faster instrument turnaround, with 134 C operation, 30 psi pressure range, fast exhaust capability, and PC-based records.

detail.seo_description: PEIC horizontal high-speed steam sterilizer with BIS IS 3829 Part 2 coverage, 268 L indicative capacity, 134 C operation, fast exhaust capability, and PC-based records.
detail.eyebrow: BIS IS 3829 Part 2 - High-speed steam sterilizer
detail.title: High-speed horizontal sterilizer for faster instrument turnaround.
detail.summary: A PEIC-manufactured high-speed steam sterilizer for OT and sterile-processing teams that need 134 C operation, faster exhaust behavior, programmable control, cycle visibility, and service accountability.
detail.brief_title: Specified for quicker high-temperature steam cycles
detail.brief: The high-speed horizontal model focuses on faster instrument turnaround through 134 C operation, higher pressure, rapid exhaust capability, vacuum-assisted drying, and PC-based monitoring and reporting. PEIC confirms cycle behavior, exhaust settings, utilities, and accessories from the buyer's load and department workflow.
detail.customization_title: Configuration can be worked on around
customization: High-speed instrument cycles, low-pressure cycles, exhaust rate, and drying expectations
Heating load selection, electrical supply, and installation readiness
Cycle programming, recording, graphing, printer, and password/security requirements
Tray, stand, filtered-air drying, vacuum breaker, and chamber drain arrangements
SS grade, finish, material thickness, and procurement documentation requirements
detail.options_title: Typical points PEIC confirms for high-speed use.
detail.options_intro: High-speed operation is load-dependent. PEIC confirms the practical cycle configuration after understanding instruments, wrapping, drying needs, and site utilities.

options.label: Chamber and capacity
options.choices: D 500 x L 1300 mm, 268 L approx., cylindrical chamber
options.note: Useful for OT and sterile-processing teams balancing footprint and turnaround.

options.label: Temperature and pressure
options.choices: 134 C approx., 30 psi operating pressure, adjustable settings
options.note: Supports high-speed steam sterilization protocols where appropriate for the load.

options.label: Exhaust behavior
options.choices: Rapid exhaust target for high-speed operation plus adjustable slow exhaust for delicate loads
options.note: Exhaust profile is matched to load sensitivity and process requirements.

options.label: Control and documentation
options.choices: PC-based automation, programmable cycles, real-time graphs, F0 display, reports, and manual override
options.note: Helps teams monitor performance and retain cycle records.

options.label: Steam and drying package
options.choices: Vacuum pump, ejector, filtered-air drying system, baffle, trap, gauges, and safety valves
options.note: Supports quick drying and pressure-management requirements.

detail.spec_note: Indicative values include PHSS#APC#268, D 500 x L 1300 mm, 268 L approx., 18/27 kW heating, 134 C operation, and 30 psi operating pressure.
detail.highlights_title: What buyers should notice in the high-speed model.

highlights.title: High-speed cycle intent
highlights.description: The operating temperature, pressure range, and exhaust focus are aimed at faster instrument turnaround where the load permits.

highlights.title: Adjustable exhaust control
highlights.description: Rapid exhaust and controlled slow exhaust options help match cycle behavior to instruments and delicate loads.

highlights.title: Full process visibility
highlights.description: PC-based monitoring, live graphs, digital displays, F0 value, and printable records support controlled operation.

highlights.title: Stainless pressure-vessel build
highlights.description: SS-316 chamber surfaces, SS-304 jacket and generator, insulation, baffle, gauges, trap, and valves support reliable use.

applications: Departments requiring cycle records and operator traceability
buyer_questions: Which instruments and packaging will be processed in high-speed cycles?
Is rapid exhaust always required, or should slow exhaust also be configured?
What drying standard and vacuum performance are expected?
What electrical load, water, drain, and documentation requirements apply at site?
detail.cta_description: Share the instrument load, throughput target, utilities, and documentation needs. PEIC will recommend a suitable high-speed configuration.

manufactured_products.name: Fully Automatic Vertical Autoclave
manufactured_products.description: Fully automatic vertical autoclave range from 75 to 100 L with microprocessor PID control, 121 C operation, SS-304 construction, and compact lab or clinic footprint.

detail.seo_description: PEIC fully automatic vertical autoclave range from 75 to 100 L with microprocessor PID control, 121 C operation, SS-304 construction, and optional perforated basket.
detail.eyebrow: PEIC manufactured - Fully automatic vertical range
detail.title: Compact fully automatic vertical autoclaves for labs, clinics, and smaller departments.
detail.summary: A PEIC-manufactured vertical autoclave range for compact sterilization needs, with 75-100 L indicative capacities, microprocessor control, automatic cycle functions, and SS-304 construction.
detail.brief: The vertical autoclave range is suited to laboratories, clinics, outpatient departments, and smaller sterile-processing requirements. A microprocessor-based controller supports programmable operation, automatic soak, purge and exhaust settings, timer control, and high-alarm support.
detail.customization_title: Configuration can be worked on around
customization: Capacity selection across 75, 88, 95, and 100 L models
Heating load, electrical readiness, and installation space
Controller settings, timer range, automatic purge, soak, and exhaust behavior
Basket, dressing drum, chamber accessories, and load handling
SS-304 finish, piping, gasket, insulation, and documentation requirements
detail.options_title: Typical points PEIC confirms for vertical autoclaves.
detail.options_intro: The vertical range is selected from capacity, load type, available utilities, and accessory needs.

options.label: Capacity models
options.choices: PVS#MP#75, 88, 95, and 100 with 16 inch diameter chambers
options.note: Capacity selection depends on load height, basket size, and department volume.

options.label: Control package
options.choices: Microprocessor controller with PID, LCD display, program keys, start/stop, Pt-100 sensor, timer and alarms
options.note: Supports repeatable automatic operation in smaller facilities.

options.label: Operating conditions
options.choices: 121 C approx., 22 lbs working pressure, adjustable pressure settings
options.note: Final operating parameters are confirmed against load and procurement requirement.

options.label: Construction
options.choices: SS-304 chamber, jacket, bottom plate, lid, ring, fittings, piping, silicone gasket and glass-wool insulation
options.note: Stainless construction supports cleaning and durability.

options.label: Accessories
options.choices: Optional SS-304 perforated basket or dressing drum
options.note: Accessory selection depends on load shape and department workflow.

detail.spec_note: Indicative model capacities include 75, 88, 95, and 100 L. Public values include 6/9 kW heating, 121 C operation, and 22 lbs working pressure.
detail.highlights_title: What buyers should notice in the vertical range.

highlights.title: Compact footprint
highlights.description: The vertical chamber format suits departments that need sterilization support without a horizontal CSSD layout.

highlights.title: Automatic cycle support
highlights.description: Microprocessor control, automatic purging, timer function, high alarm, and pressure-linked cycle start simplify operation.

highlights.title: SS-304 construction
highlights.description: Stainless chamber, jacket, lid components, fittings, piping, and argon-arc welded joints support practical maintenance.

highlights.title: Useful safety fittings
highlights.description: Low-water cut-off, gauge glass, pressure gauge, thermometer, steam release, and drain/inlet valves support safer routine use.

applications: Dressing drums, small instruments, and compact sterilization loads
buyer_questions: Which capacity model fits the expected load height and volume?
Will baskets, dressing drums, or other accessories be needed?
What electrical supply and installation footprint are available?
Are automatic purge, exhaust, timing, or documentation needs specified in procurement?
detail.cta_description: Share expected load type, desired capacity, available space, and electrical supply. PEIC will recommend the suitable vertical autoclave model and accessories.

manufactured_products.name: Bowl & Utensil Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: OT bowl and utensil sterilizer with 100 L indicative capacity, SS-316 heavy-gauge body, pedal-operated dome lid, perforated tray, 9 kW heating, and low-water protection.

detail.seo_description: PEIC bowl and utensil sterilizer for operation theatre workflows with SS-316 construction, 100 L indicative capacity, pedal-operated lid, 9 kW heating, and low-water protection.
detail.eyebrow: PEIC manufactured - OT bowl and utensil sterilizer
detail.title: Bowl and utensil sterilizer for operation theatre support workflows.
detail.summary: A stainless-steel bowl and utensil sterilizer for OT, ward, ICU, and patient-care support areas that need practical hot-water sterilization outside the main CSSD workflow.
detail.brief_title: Designed around practical OT utensil handling
detail.brief: This unit combines a heavy-gauge SS-316 body, dome-type lid, pedal-operated lifting mechanism, perforated tray, stainless fittings, tubular stand, thermostat, low-water cut-off, contactor, and indicator lamps for straightforward department-level use.
detail.customization_title: Configuration can be worked on around
customization: Sterilizer size, capacity, material thickness, and SS grade where procurement allows
Tray perforation, lid handling, pedal operation, and stand height
Inlet, outlet, overflow, drain, and room plumbing connection needs
Electrical supply, thermostat behavior, indicators, and control-box placement
Levelling flanges, tubular stand finish, and installation footprint
detail.options_title: Typical points PEIC confirms for OT utensil workflows.
detail.options_intro: This product is usually finalized around room workflow, utility placement, and the size of bowls or utensils handled by the department.

options.label: Body and tray
options.choices: SS-316 heavy-gauge body with SS-316 perforated tray
options.note: Supports cleaning, durability, and practical handling of bowls and utensils.

options.label: Lid and handling
options.choices: Dome-type lid with pedal-operated mechanical lift
options.note: Keeps operation practical for OT or ward support staff.

options.label: Heating and controls
options.choices: Three 3 kW immersion heaters, thermostat, low-water cut-off, L.T. contactor and LED lamps
options.note: Provides boiling support with protection against low-water heater damage.

options.label: Utilities
options.choices: 400-440 V AC, 3-phase supply with inlet, outlet and overflow valves
options.note: Site electrical and plumbing readiness should be checked before installation.

options.label: Stand and installation
options.choices: Tubular stand with levelling flanges and stainless fittings
options.note: Useful where floor levelling and cleaning access matter.

detail.spec_note: Indicative public values include 24 x 16 x 16 inch size, 100 L capacity, SS-316 body, and 9 kW total heating. Material and thickness can vary as per customer requirement.
detail.highlights_title: What buyers should notice in the bowl and utensil sterilizer.

highlights.title: OT-focused handling
highlights.description: The pedal-operated lid and perforated tray are suited to practical bowl and utensil workflows.

highlights.title: Heavy-gauge stainless build
highlights.description: SS-316 body, argon-arc welding, stainless fittings, and bright finish support hygiene and durability.

highlights.title: Simple electrical protection
highlights.description: Thermostat, low-water cut-off, contactor, immersion heaters, and LED indicators support routine operation.

highlights.title: Site-fit flexibility
highlights.description: Stand, levelling, valve placement, size, and material thickness can be discussed for the room.

applications: Operation theatre bowl and utensil workflows
Departments needing localized support outside main CSSD
buyer_questions: What bowl and utensil sizes will the tray need to handle?
Where should inlet, outlet, overflow, and drain connections be placed?
Is the available electrical supply 400-440 V AC, 3-phase?
Are specific SS grade, thickness, stand height, or room-fit requirements included in procurement?
detail.cta_title: Request bowl and utensil sterilizer details
detail.cta_description: Share the room workflow, expected load size, utility points, and installation constraints. PEIC will confirm a suitable configuration.

manufactured_products.name: Fully Automatic Hot & Cold Water Pressure Sterilizer
manufactured_products.description: Fully automatic twin-shell hot and cold water pressure sterilizer with 10, 15, and 20 gallon options, 121-125 C operation, microprocessor/PLC control, and serviceable SS construction.

detail.seo_title: Hot & Cold Water Pressure Sterilizer | PEIC
detail.seo_description: PEIC fully automatic hot and cold water pressure sterilizer with twin shells, 10/15/20 gallon options, 121-125 C operation, microprocessor or PLC control, and stainless construction.
detail.eyebrow: PEIC manufactured - Fully automatic twin-shell water sterilizer
detail.title: Hot and cold water pressure sterilizer for controlled sterile-water handling.
detail.summary: A fully automatic pressure sterilizer with twin cylindrical shells for hot and cold water supply, designed for healthcare departments that need controlled sterile-water draw-off, safety fittings, and serviceable stainless construction.
detail.brief_title: Twin-shell system for hot and cold sterile-water supply
detail.brief: The hot and cold water pressure sterilizer uses separate cylindrical shells, removable service end plates, draw-off faucets, safety valve, pressure gauge, filters, steam trap, gauge glass, low-water protection, and a bucket platform for practical department use.
detail.customization_title: Configuration can be worked on around
customization: 10, 15, or 20 gallon capacity selection and heating load
Microprocessor or PLC operation for hot and cold pressure tanks
Draw-off faucet placement, anti-splash nozzles, bucket platform, and room workflow
Water inlet, drain, filter, steam trap, copper coil, and pressure fittings
SS finish, stand, levelling, service access, and cleaning requirements
detail.options_title: Typical points PEIC confirms for water-pressure sterilizers.
detail.options_intro: Final configuration depends on capacity, department water usage, room services, and procurement specifications.

options.label: Capacity and heating
options.choices: 10 and 15 gallon at 12 kW; 20 gallon at 18 kW
options.note: Capacity and load are selected from sterile-water demand and available electrical supply.

options.label: Twin-shell design
options.choices: Hot and cold cylindrical shells with dished end and removable service end plate
options.note: Supports pressure operation and periodic sediment cleaning.

options.label: Control package
options.choices: Fully automatic microprocessor or PLC operation
options.note: Control choice is finalized around procurement preference and service expectations.

options.label: Draw-off and water path
options.choices: Easy-clean faucets, anti-splash removable nozzles, two-way inlet valve, filters, trap, drains and copper cold-water coil
options.note: Water path design should match room workflow and maintenance access.

options.label: Safety fittings
options.choices: Spring-loaded safety valve, pressure gauge, pressure stat, thermometer, air release, vacuum breaker and gauge glass
options.note: Safety and indication fittings are confirmed with design pressure and site operation.

detail.spec_note: Indicative public values include 10, 15, and 20 gallon capacities, 121-125 C operation, 15-22 psi working pressure, and 440 V AC 3-phase supply.
detail.highlights_title: What buyers should notice in the hot and cold water pressure sterilizer.

highlights.title: Separate hot and cold supply
highlights.description: Twin cylindrical shells support controlled draw-off for hot and cold sterile-water workflows.

highlights.title: Serviceable construction
highlights.description: Removable end plates, drain valves, filters, trap, and cleaning access are intended to simplify maintenance.

highlights.title: Automatic pressure operation
highlights.description: Microprocessor or PLC control, pressure stat, indicators, and low-water protection support controlled operation.

highlights.title: Department-ready fittings
highlights.description: Draw-off faucets, bucket platform, anti-splash nozzles, gauge glass, thermometer, and pressure gauge support daily use.

applications: Hot and cold pressure water supply workflows
Hospitals needing draw-off faucets and bucket collection
Departments requiring serviceable pressure-vessel water systems
buyer_questions: Which capacity is required: 10, 15, or 20 gallons?
How many draw-off points and bucket collection clearances are needed?
Should operation be specified as microprocessor or PLC based?
What water inlet, drainage, electrical supply, and service access are available?
detail.cta_title: Request hot and cold water sterilizer guidance
detail.cta_description: Share required capacity, room layout, water points, electrical supply, and control preference. PEIC will confirm an appropriate configuration.

manufactured_range.label: Available on enquiry
manufactured_range.title: And many more sterilization and CSSD support systems
manufactured_range.description: The six featured categories above have dedicated product pages. PEIC also supports related sterilization and department-support requirements through enquiry-led configuration, documentation, and service planning.

hospital_scope.label: Hospital-wide equipment scope
hospital_scope.title: One technical partner across CSSD and the wider hospital.
hospital_scope.description: PEIC helps biomedical engineering and procurement teams consolidate equipment sourcing beyond CSSD, bringing specification support, quotation coordination, installation, training, AMC/CMC planning, and service escalation into one accountable relationship.

partner_companies.name: AngioDynamics
partner_companies.description: Specialized oncology systems for radiofrequency and microwave ablation, including NanoKnife IRE technology.

partner_companies.name: Steris Corporation

partner_companies.name: Dentsply Sirona

partner_companies.name: Samsung Electronics

partner_companies.name: Richard Wolf GmbH
partner_companies.description: Premium medical endoscopic systems and instrumentation.

partner_companies.name: Medicon Germany
partner_companies.description: German surgical instruments and specialty OT instrumentation supplied through PEIC's operating theatre portfolio.

partner_companies.name: BOWA Medical

partner_companies.name: ATMOS MedizinTechnik

partner_companies.name: INTRASENSE

partner_companies.name: Designs for Vision
partner_companies.description: LED HDi Headlights with High-Definition Imaging, compact Hi-Definition Video, Autofluorescence Wound Imaging (REVEAL FC), and REVEAL Fluorescence Guided Dentistry.

partner_companies.name: Confident Dental Equipment
partner_companies.description: We provide their comprehensive dental range, including advanced operatory suites and clinical equipment.

partner_companies.name: Neuro Equilibrium Diagnostics
partner_companies.description: Vestibular diagnostic and rehabilitation systems including VNG, SVV, DVA, CCG, rotary chair, vHIT, stabilometry, posturography, vestibular rehabilitation, and vestibular assessment platforms.

partner_companies.name: Simtek Medico Systems
partner_companies.description: Our portfolio includes their precision critical care range, specifically Syringe Pumps, Infusion Pumps, and Non-Stress Test (NST) Machines.

partner_companies.name: Bird Meditech
partner_companies.description: We supply maternal and neonatal care solutions, including BIS-marked radiant heat warmers and high-intensity LED phototherapy units.

cta.label: Product Support
cta.title: Need specifications, a quotation, or a technical recommendation?
cta.description: Tell us the department, quantity, city, and intended use. PEIC will respond with relevant specifications and procurement guidance.
